title: SUB GEOGRAPHY TOPIC 1 TRANSPORT 2 MINERELS PARMAR

questions.question: Which country has the second largest road network in the world? / विश्व में दूसरा सबसे बड़ा सड़क नेटवर्क किस देश का है?
questions.explanation: India has the second largest road network in the world, totaling about 66.71 lakh km.

questions.question: Which state has the highest road density in India? / भारत में सर्वाधिक सड़क घनत्व वाला राज्य कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Kerala has the highest road density, while Arunachal Pradesh has the lowest.

questions.question: Which organization is responsible for maintaining district and village roads? / जिला और गांव की सड़कों के रखरखाव के लिए कौन सा संगठन जिम्मेदार है?
questions.explanation: Public Works Department (PWD), established in 1854, maintains district and village roads.

questions.question: When was the National Highways Authority of India (NHAI) established? / भारतीय राष्ट्रीय राजमार्ग प्राधिकरण (NHAI) की स्थापना कब हुई थी?
questions.explanation: NHAI was established in 1995 and its headquarters is in New Delhi.

questions.question: Which project connects Srinagar, Kanyakumari, Silchar, and Porbandar? / कौन सी परियोजना श्रीनगर, कन्याकुमारी, सिलचर और पोरबंदर को जोड़ती है?
options: North-South and East-West Corridor / उत्तर-दक्षिण और पूर्व-पश्चिम कॉरिडोर
questions.explanation: The North-South corridor connects Srinagar to Kanyakumari and East-West connects Silchar to Porbandar.

questions.question: What is the total length of the Golden Quadrilateral project? / स्वर्णिम चतुर्भुज परियोजना की कुल लंबाई कितनी है?
questions.explanation: The Golden Quadrilateral connects Delhi, Mumbai, Chennai, and Kolkata with a length of 5846 km.

questions.question: Which is the longest National Highway in India? / भारत का सबसे लंबा राष्ट्रीय राजमार्ग कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: NH 44 is the longest highway, running from Srinagar to Kanyakumari.

questions.question: Which organization constructs roads in the border areas of India? / भारत के सीमावर्ती क्षेत्रों में सड़कों का निर्माण कौन सा संगठन करता है?
questions.explanation: BRO was established in May 1960 to develop roads in northern and northeastern border areas.

questions.question: In which year was the first railway line opened in India? / भारत में पहली रेलवे लाइन किस वर्ष खोली गई थी?
questions.explanation: The first train ran between Bombay and Thane in 1853, covering 34 km.

questions.question: Where is the headquarters of the North Eastern Railway zone located? / पूर्वोत्तर रेलवे जोन का मुख्यालय कहाँ स्थित है?
questions.explanation: The headquarters of the North Eastern Railway is located in Gorakhpur.

questions.question: Which is the longest railway tunnel in India? / भारत की सबसे लंबी रेलवे सुरंग कौन सी है?
options: Pir Panjal Tunnel / पीर पंजाल सुरंग
questions.explanation: Pir Panjal (Banihal Railway Tunnel) in J&K is the longest railway tunnel in India.

questions.question: Which railway line runs along the western coast of India through the Western Ghats? / कौन सी रेलवे लाइन पश्चिमी घाट के माध्यम से भारत के पश्चिमी तट के साथ चलती है?
options: South Western Railway / दक्षिण पश्चिम रेलवे
questions.explanation: Konkan Railway (760 km) connects Roha in Maharashtra to Mangalore in Karnataka.

questions.question: What is the length of the broad gauge railway track? / ब्रॉड गेज रेलवे ट्रैक की लंबाई (चौड़ाई) कितनी होती है?
questions.explanation: Broad gauge is the most common track width in India at 1.676 meters.

questions.question: How many major ports are currently in India? / वर्तमान में भारत में कितने प्रमुख बंदरगाह हैं?
questions.explanation: India has 12 major ports and approximately 200 minor/intermediate ports.

questions.question: Which is the largest natural port in India? / भारत का सबसे बड़ा प्राकृतिक बंदरगाह कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Mumbai is the largest natural port and the busiest in India.

questions.question: Which port is known as the "Tidal Port"? / किस बंदरगाह को "ज्वारीय बंदरगाह" के रूप में जाना जाता है?
questions.explanation: Kandla Port in Gujarat is a tidal port, renamed Deendayal Port.

questions.question: Which is the deepest landlocked and protected port in India? / भारत का सबसे गहरा भूमिबद्ध और सुरक्षित बंदरगाह कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Vishakhapatnam is the deepest landlocked port on the east coast.

questions.question: Which port was developed to relieve pressure on the Mumbai port? / मुंबई बंदरगाह के दबाव को कम करने के लिए किस बंदरगाह को विकसित किया गया था?
options: Jawaharlal Nehru Port (Nhava Sheva) / जवाहरलाल नेहरू पोर्ट
questions.explanation: Nhava Sheva is India's largest container port, built to decongest Mumbai port.

questions.question: National Waterway 1 (NW-1) is on which river system? / राष्ट्रीय जलमार्ग 1 (NW-1) किस नदी प्रणाली पर है?
questions.explanation: NW-1 runs from Prayagraj to Haldia (1620 km) on the Ganga river system.

questions.question: When was Air India nationalized? / एयर इंडिया का राष्ट्रीयकरण कब किया गया था?
questions.explanation: Air transport was nationalized in 1953 with the formation of two corporations.

questions.question: Which is the busiest international airport in India? / भारत का सबसे व्यस्त अंतर्राष्ट्रीय हवाई अड्डा कौन सा है?
options: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Airport / छत्रपति शिवाजी महाराज हवाई अड्डा
Indira Gandhi International Airport / इंदिरा गांधी अंतर्राष्ट्रीय हवाई अड्डा
questions.explanation: IGI Airport in New Delhi is the busiest airport in India.

questions.question: Where is the Netaji Subhash Chandra Bose International Airport located? / नेताजी सुभाष चंद्र बोस अंतर्राष्ट्रीय हवाई अड्डा कहाँ स्थित है?
questions.explanation: This international airport is located in Dum Dum, Kolkata.

questions.question: Which state is associated with the Raja Sansi (Sri Guru Ram Dass Jee) International Airport? / राजा सांसी (श्री गुरु राम दास जी) अंतर्राष्ट्रीय हवाई अड्डा किस राज्य से संबंधित है?
questions.explanation: This airport is located in Amritsar, Punjab.

questions.question: Which is the oldest artificial port on the eastern coast of India? / भारत के पूर्वी तट पर सबसे पुराना कृत्रिम बंदरगाह कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Chennai is one of the oldest artificial ports on the eastern coast.

questions.question: Where is the headquarters of the Inland Waterways Authority of India? / भारतीय अंतर्देशीय जलमार्ग प्राधिकरण का मुख्यालय कहाँ स्थित है?
questions.explanation: The Inland Waterways Authority of India is headquartered in Noida, UP.

questions.question: Which port is known as the "Queen of the Arabian Sea"? / किस बंदरगाह को "अरब सागर की रानी" कहा जाता है?
questions.explanation: Kochi port, located in Kerala, is known as the Queen of the Arabian Sea.

questions.question: Which airport is named after Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar? / डॉ. बाबासाहेब अंबेडकर के नाम पर कौन सा हवाई अड्डा है?
questions.explanation: Nagpur International Airport is named after Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar.

questions.question: Which project aims to modernize India's ports and promote port-led development? / किस परियोजना का उद्देश्य भारत के बंदरगाहों का आधुनिकीकरण और बंदरगाह-आधारित विकास को बढ़ावा देना है?
questions.explanation: Sagarmala project focuses on port modernization and coastal community development.

questions.question: Veer Savarkar International Airport is located in? / वीर सावरकर अंतर्राष्ट्रीय हवाई अड्डा कहाँ स्थित है?
options: Port Blair (Andaman & Nicobar) / पोर्ट ब्लेयर (अंडमान और निकोबार)
questions.explanation: The airport in Port Blair is named after Veer Savarkar.

questions.question: Which type of iron ore is known as the 'finest' with up to 70% iron content? / 70% लोहे के अंश के साथ किस प्रकार के लौह अयस्क को 'सबसे उत्तम' माना जाता है?
questions.explanation: Magnetite is the finest iron ore with very high iron content (up to 70%).

questions.question: Which state is the largest producer of Manganese in India? / भारत में मैंगनीज का सबसे बड़ा उत्पादक राज्य कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Madhya Pradesh is the leading producer of Manganese in India.

questions.question: Which metal was the first to be discovered and used by humans? / मनुष्यों द्वारा खोजी गई और उपयोग की जाने वाली पहली धातु कौन सी थी?
questions.explanation: Copper was the first metal to be discovered and used by humans.

questions.question: Khetri mines in Rajasthan are famous for the production of? / राजस्थान में खेतड़ी की खदानें किसके उत्पादन के लिए प्रसिद्ध हैं?
questions.explanation: Khetri mines are a major center for copper production in India.

questions.question: Which mineral is the main ore of Aluminium? / कौन सा खनिज एल्युमीनियम का मुख्य अयस्क है?
questions.explanation: Bauxite is the primary ore from which aluminium is extracted.

questions.question: Which state is the largest producer of Bauxite in India? / भारत में बॉक्साइट का सबसे बड़ा उत्पादक राज्य कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Odisha is the largest bauxite-producing state in India.

questions.question: In which state are the Kolar Gold Fields (KGF) located? / कोलार गोल्ड फील्ड्स (KGF) किस राज्य में स्थित हैं?
questions.explanation: Kolar Gold Fields, famous for gold mining, are located in Karnataka.

questions.question: Which state has the largest gold reserves in India? / भारत में सोने का सबसे बड़ा भंडार किस राज्य में है?
questions.explanation: Bihar holds the largest share of gold reserves in India.

questions.question: Which mineral is used in the electrical industry due to its di-electric strength? / अपनी विद्युत-रोधी शक्ति के कारण विद्युत उद्योग में किस खनिज का उपयोग किया जाता है?
questions.explanation: Mica is indispensable in electronics due to its insulation properties.

questions.question: Which is the only state in India that produces diamonds? / भारत का एकमात्र राज्य कौन सा है जो हीरे का उत्पादन करता है?
questions.explanation: Panna in Madhya Pradesh is the only diamond-producing area in India.

questions.question: What is coal commonly known as? / कोयले को सामान्यतः किस नाम से जाना जाता है?
questions.explanation: Coal is referred to as 'Buried Sunshine' due to its energy storage.

questions.question: Over 97% of India's coal reserves are found in which valley? / भारत के 97% से अधिक कोयला भंडार किस घाटी में पाए जाते हैं?
questions.explanation: Major coal reserves are in Damodar, Son, Mahanadi, and Godavari valleys.

questions.question: Which is the highest quality of coal with 80-90% carbon? / 80-90% कार्बन वाला कोयले का उच्चतम गुण वाला प्रकार कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Anthracite is the hardest and best quality coal.

questions.question: Neyveli in Tamil Nadu is famous for which type of coal? / तमिलनाडु में नेवेली किस प्रकार के कोयले के लिए प्रसिद्ध है?
questions.explanation: Neyveli is a major producer of Lignite, also known as brown coal.

questions.question: Which is the oldest oil-producing state in India? / भारत का सबसे पुराना तेल उत्पादक राज्य कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Assam is the oldest oil-producing state, with Digboi as a key site.

questions.question: Where was India's first oil refinery commissioned in 1901? / 1901 में भारत की पहली तेल रिफाइनरी कहाँ चालू की गई थी?
questions.explanation: Digboi refinery in Assam was the first to be commissioned in 1901.

questions.question: What is the primary component of natural gas? / प्राकृतिक गैस का प्राथमिक घटक क्या है?
questions.explanation: Methane (CH4) makes up the bulk of natural gas.

questions.question: What substance is added to natural gas to detect leaks by smell? / रिसाव का पता लगाने के लिए प्राकृतिक गैस में कौन सा गंधयुक्त पदार्थ मिलाया जाता है?
questions.explanation: Ethyl mercaptan is added to give gas a distinct odor for safety.

questions.question: Monazite sands of Kerala are rich in which mineral? / केरल की मोनाजाइट रेत किस खनिज से समृद्ध है?
questions.explanation: Monazite sand is a primary source of Thorium in India.

questions.question: What is the function of a 'moderator' in a nuclear reactor? / परमाणु रिएक्टर में 'मॉडरेटर' का क्या कार्य है?
options: To absorb neutrons / न्यूट्रॉन को अवशोषित करना
To slow down neutrons / न्यूट्रॉन को धीमा करना
To generate heat / गर्मी पैदा करना
To speed up neutrons / न्यूट्रॉन को तेज करना
questions.explanation: Moderators slow down neutrons to maintain a chain reaction.

questions.question: Control rods in nuclear reactors are typically made of? / परमाणु रिएक्टरों में नियंत्रण छड़ें आमतौर पर किसकी बनी होती हैं?
options: Boron or Cadmium / बोरोन या कैडमियम
questions.explanation: Boron/Cadmium rods absorb extra neutrons to control the reaction.

questions.question: Which was the first nuclear power plant in India (1969)? / भारत का पहला परमाणु ऊर्जा संयंत्र (1969) कौन सा था?
questions.explanation: Tarapur (Maharashtra) was India's first nuclear power station.

questions.question: Where is the headquarters of the International Solar Alliance (ISA)? / अंतर्राष्ट्रीय सौर गठबंधन (ISA) का मुख्यालय कहाँ है?
questions.explanation: The ISA is headquartered in Gurugram, India.

questions.question: Which is the largest solar park in India? / भारत का सबसे बड़ा सौर पार्क कौन सा है?
options: Pavagada Solar Park / पावागढ़ सौर पार्क
Rewa Solar Park / रीवा सौर पार्क
Kurnool Solar Park / कुरनूल सौर पार्क
Bhadla Solar Park / भादला सोलर पार्क
questions.explanation: Bhadla Solar Park in Rajasthan is the largest in the country.

questions.question: Where is the largest wind farm cluster located in India? / भारत में सबसे बड़ा पवन फार्म क्लस्टर कहाँ स्थित है?
questions.explanation: The largest wind cluster extends from Nagercoil to Madurai in TN.

questions.question: Which region is ideal for tidal energy in India? / भारत में कौन सा क्षेत्र ज्वारीय ऊर्जा के लिए आदर्श है?
options: Gulf of Khambhat / खंभात की खाड़ी
questions.explanation: The Gulf of Khambhat provides excellent conditions for tidal power.

questions.question: Puga Valley in Ladakh is famous for which type of energy? / लद्दाख में पुगा घाटी किस प्रकार की ऊर्जा के लिए प्रसिद्ध है?
questions.explanation: Puga Valley is an experimental site for Geothermal energy.

questions.question: Biogas is generated through which biological process? / बायोगैस किस जैविक प्रक्रिया के माध्यम से उत्पन्न होती है?
questions.explanation: Biogas is produced by the breakdown of waste without oxygen.

questions.question: What is the approximate percentage of Methane in Biogas? / बायोगैस में मीथेन का अनुमानित प्रतिशत कितना है?
questions.explanation: Methane (CH4) accounts for 55-70% of biogas composition.

questions.question: Which mineral is essential for smelting iron ore in a blast furnace? / ब्लास्ट फर्नेस में लौह अयस्क को गलाने के लिए कौन सा खनिज आवश्यक है?
questions.explanation: Limestone acts as a flux in the smelting of iron ore.
